data.title: Flutter Entertainment Confirms Updated Share Capital and Voting Rights Baseline
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Flutter Entertainment PLC ( (FLUT) ) has issued an announcement.

Flutter Entertainment plc has confirmed that its total number of ordinary shares in issue as of April 30, 2026 stands at 173,972,199, each with a nominal value of €0.09 and carrying one voting right. This updated share count establishes the official denominator for investors assessing whether they must disclose holdings or changes in their positions under UK Financial Conduct Authority transparency rules, providing clarity on voting power and regulatory reporting thresholds for shareholders.

The announcement does not indicate any new issuance or buyback but serves to reinforce compliance with disclosure regulations following Flutter’s listing structure and ongoing obligations in the UK market. By reiterating the current share capital and voting rights, the company offers stakeholders a clear reference point for governance, helping institutional and retail investors accurately calculate their notifiable interests and maintain regulatory conformity.

More about Flutter Entertainment PLC

Flutter Entertainment plc is a global online gambling and sports betting group headquartered in Ireland and listed in New York and London. The company operates a portfolio of well-known betting and gaming brands, offering online sportsbook, casino and related interactive entertainment products to a broad international customer base.

See more insights into FLUT stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Pilgrim’s Pride Shareholders Back Board, Reject ESG Proposals
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Pilgrim’s Pride ( (PPC) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 29, 2026, Pilgrim’s Pride stockholders held their annual meeting and elected all eight JBS-affiliated directors and both equity directors to the board, reaffirming the company’s existing governance structure. Investors also approved on an advisory basis the executive compensation program and ratified KPMG LLP as the independent auditor for the fiscal year ending December 27, 2026, signaling continued support for current management and financial oversight.

Shareholders decisively rejected two stockholder proposals seeking a report on internal diversity and inclusion policies and practices, as well as a separate proposal calling for political spending disclosure. The votes against both measures indicate investors were not prepared at this time to mandate additional reporting requirements in these environmental, social, and governance areas, preserving the company’s current disclosure approach.

The most recent analyst rating on (PPC) stock is a Hold with a $38.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pilgrim’s Pride stock, see the PPC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PPC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PPC is a Neutral.

The score reflects solid/improving underlying financial performance and an attractive low earnings multiple, partially offset by weakening near-term profitability highlighted on the latest earnings call and notably bearish technical conditions (price below key moving averages with negative MACD).

To see Spark’s full report on PPC stock, click here.

More about Pilgrim’s Pride

Pilgrim’s Pride is a global food company in the meat and poultry industry, best known for producing and marketing fresh, frozen, and value-added chicken and pork products. The company primarily serves retail, foodservice, and industrial customers, with a market focus spanning North America, Europe, and other international regions where it supplies branded and private-label protein products.

data.title: Cue Biopharma licenses Ascendant-221 and raises new capital
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Cue Biopharma ( (CUE) ).

On April 30, 2026, Cue Biopharma entered a global (ex‑Greater China) exclusive license with Ascendant Health Sciences for Ascendant‑221, a Phase 2 dual‑mechanism anti‑IgE antibody, paying $15 million upfront and committing to up to $676.5 million in milestones plus high single‑ to low double‑digit royalties. The deal immediately establishes Cue as a clinical‑stage allergy company, with Ascendant‑221 already in a China Phase 2 chronic spontaneous urticaria trial and a Cue‑run global Phase 2b food‑allergy study planned after data expected in the second half of 2026.

In parallel on April 30, 2026, Cue signed a securities purchase agreement with Ascendant under which Ascendant receives pre‑funded warrants and potential “top‑up” equity or warrants sized to reach at least 7.5% ownership and a minimum value of $15 million, alongside an investor agreement imposing lock‑up, standstill and board-aligned voting commitments. The same day Cue also launched a $30 million private placement of pre‑funded warrants and five‑year warrants with accredited investors, including new CEO Shao‑Lee Lin, adopted a 2026 Inducement Stock Incentive Plan for up to 3 million shares, appointed Lin as president and chief executive officer effective April 30, 2026, and agreed separation terms with outgoing interim CEO Lucinda Warren, collectively strengthening its balance sheet, governance and incentive structure for a transition to a more fully fledged clinical‑stage immunology company.

The most recent analyst rating on (CUE) stock is a Buy with a $4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cue Biopharma stock, see the CUE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CUE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CUE is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance, driven by persistent losses and negative free cash flow. Offsetting this, technical momentum is strong (though overbought), valuation screens as low on P/E, and a positive corporate event adds incremental support via a $7.5M milestone payment.

To see Spark’s full report on CUE stock, click here.

More about Cue Biopharma

Cue Biopharma, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing therapeutic biologics that selectively modulate disease-specific T cells to treat autoimmune, inflammatory and allergic disorders. Its lead assets include Ascendant-221, a dual‑mechanism anti-IgE antibody in Phase 2 for allergic diseases, and CUE-401, an engineered IL-2/TGF‑beta bifunctional biologic designed to induce immune tolerance in serious autoimmune conditions.

The company has also built the Immuno-STAT platform for in vivo targeting of disease-specific T cells without broad immune suppression and is led by an experienced management team with a track record in immunology drug development and strategic asset acquisition. Cue Biopharma is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker CUE and is positioning itself as a pipeline-driven player pursuing functional cures in immunological disorders.

Average Trading Volume: 370,550

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $47.98M

For a thorough assessment of CUE stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: UWM Holding Revises Bid to Acquire Two Harbors
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

UWM Holding ( (UWMC) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 30, 2026, UWM Holdings issued an open letter to stockholders of Two Harbors Investment Corp. detailing a revised proposal to acquire the company, allowing Two Harbors investors to elect for each share either $12 in cash or 2.3328 shares of UWM Class A stock, backed by a committed $1.3 billion unsecured bridge facility from Mizuho Bank. UWM argues its bid is clearly superior to Two Harbors’ amended merger agreement with CrossCountry Mortgage, criticizing the Two Harbors board for entrenchment, alleged failure to fully disclose UWM’s prior April 20, 2026 proposal, and for not adequately pursuing higher value or optionality for shareholders ahead of a May 19, 2026 special meeting.

UWM also emphasizes that its financing carries no market or collateral-based contingencies and highlights that the stock exchange ratio matches the all-stock merger terms Two Harbors’ board accepted in December 2025, implying potential additional upside for investors who opt for shares. By making the terms public and contrasting its offer with CrossCountry’s all-cash transaction and financing structure, UWM is attempting to rally Two Harbors shareholders to pressure the board to negotiate and accept what it portrays as a higher-value, more flexible deal, potentially reshaping the competitive landscape among nonbank mortgage players if completed.

The most recent analyst rating on (UWMC) stock is a Buy with a $10.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on UWM Holding stock, see the UWMC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on UWMC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, UWMC is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak and volatile cash flow and a historically high-leverage balance sheet profile, along with bearish technical trend signals. These are partly offset by improving operating momentum and constructive strategic/guidance commentary, plus a very high dividend yield, though valuation remains demanding with a high P/E.

To see Spark’s full report on UWMC stock, click here.

More about UWM Holding

UWM Holdings Corporation is a U.S.-listed mortgage lender and financial services company that operates through its wholesale-focused platform. It provides residential mortgage origination and related financing solutions, competing with other nonbank lenders and servicers in the U.S. housing finance market.

Average Trading Volume: 16,784,344

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $5.77B

For an in-depth examination of UWMC stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Brookfield Renewable Partners Posts Record Q1 2026 FFO and Moves to Acquire Boralex
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Brookfield Renewable Partners ( ($TSE:BEP.UT) ) is now available.

On May 1, 2026, Brookfield Renewable Partners reported record first-quarter 2026 funds from operations of $375 million, or $0.55 per unit, up 19% year-on-year, driven by strong hydro, wind and solar performance, recent acquisitions and gains on asset sales, though it still posted a net loss of $229 million after non-cash charges. The period saw the company agree to acquire Canadian-listed Boralex, deliver about 1,800 megawatts of new capacity, sign or close roughly $2.8 billion of asset sales including U.S. wind, solar and hydro portfolios and a CleanMax IPO sell-down, and bolster its balance sheet with nearly $4 billion of financings and a C$500 million 30-year note issue, reinforcing its strategy of scaling development, nuclear-related work with Westinghouse and programmatic capital recycling while ending the quarter with $4.7 billion of liquidity.

Brookfield Renewable Partners’ first-quarter 2026 results highlight record funds from operations despite a net loss, underpinned by growth in hydro, wind and solar segments and ongoing asset recycling. The acquisition of Boralex, large-scale project deliveries, Northview Energy platform creation, CleanMax partial monetization and long-dated, attractively priced corporate debt issuance collectively strengthen its market position and financial flexibility in an environment of rising global demand for low-cost, secure renewable power.

The most recent analyst rating on ($TSE:BEP.UT) stock is a Buy with a C$35.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Brookfield Renewable Partners stock, see the TSE:BEP.UT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BEP.UT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BEP.UT is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by financial risk—very high and rising leverage plus structurally negative free cash flow and recurring net losses. Offsetting factors include constructive technical momentum and a positive earnings-call outlook with solid FFO/unit growth, contracted expansion, and continued distribution increases, while valuation is mixed (high yield but loss-driven negative P/E).

To see Spark’s full report on BEP.UT stock, click here.

More about Brookfield Renewable Partners

Brookfield Renewable Partners is a global renewable power and energy transition company that owns and operates a diversified portfolio of hydroelectric, wind, solar, distributed energy, storage and other sustainable solutions assets. Listed in New York and Toronto, it focuses on contracted, inflation-linked cash flows and capital recycling across North America, South America, Europe and Asia to deliver long-term returns to investors.

Average Trading Volume: 341,919

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$30.67B

data.title: Ambev Updates Bylaws and Confirms Capital Structure in April 2026 Filing
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Ambev SA ( (ABEV) ) has issued an update.

In April 2026, Ambev S.A. filed a Form 6-K detailing updated bylaws that reaffirm its broad corporate purpose, from producing and trading beverages and food-related products to activities in agriculture, logistics, energy, technology and solid-waste management, in Brazil and abroad. The filing also restated its capital structure at R$58.3 billion divided into about 15.76 billion common shares and confirmed board authorization to increase capital up to 19 billion shares, signaling continued flexibility for future equity issuance and corporate expansion without immediate bylaw changes, which is relevant for shareholders monitoring potential dilution and growth plans.

The document clarifies that each common share carries one vote, that shares are maintained in book-entry form at a financial institution designated by the board, and that preemptive rights may be excluded in specific capital-raising situations under Brazilian corporate law. By formalizing these governance and capitalization rules, Ambev reinforces the legal framework underpinning its financing strategy and operational diversification, which can influence investor expectations regarding control, capital allocation and the company’s ability to pursue strategic opportunities in the beverage and related sectors.

The most recent analyst rating on (ABEV) stock is a Sell with a $2.65 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ambev SA stock, see the ABEV Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ABEV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ABEV is a Outperform.

ABEV scores well primarily due to resilient financial fundamentals—strong margins and an exceptionally low-leverage balance sheet—supported by attractive income characteristics (high dividend yield). Momentum is positive but technically overbought, and earnings-call takeaways remain constructive on margins and digital growth while highlighting near-term volume and cost pressures.

To see Spark’s full report on ABEV stock, click here.

More about Ambev SA

Ambev S.A. is a Brazilian beverage company headquartered in São Paulo that operates as a corporation and participates directly and through subsidiaries in the production and trading of beer, soft drinks, concentrates and other beverages, as well as foods and drinks in general. The group’s activities span raw material production, packaging, logistics, energy generation, waste recycling, technology solutions and the operation of bars and restaurants, with a strong focus on both domestic and international markets.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $46B

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Dalrada Technology Group ( (DHTI) ) has issued an update.

On April 24, 2026, Dalrada Technology Group, Inc. and certain subsidiaries received a notice of default from Nautilus Parent Holdings, LLC and Nautilus Funding Solutions, LLC – Series XIII, citing missed payments under a series of term loan and loan-and-security agreements dating back to July 25, 2023. The lenders demanded a $500,000 cure payment by May 1, 2026, warned they may accelerate the loan balances and initiate enforcement actions if payment is not made, and Dalrada said it is reviewing the notice and plans to discuss a resolution, while acknowledging there is no assurance the defaults will be cured or enforcement avoided.

Spark’s Take on DHTI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DHTI is a Neutral.

Dalrada Financial’s overall performance is hindered by significant financial challenges, including negative earnings and high leverage. While there are some positive short-term technical indicators, the overbought conditions suggest potential volatility. The valuation remains unattractive, primarily due to negative profitability metrics.

To see Spark’s full report on DHTI stock, click here.

More about Dalrada Technology Group

Dalrada Technology Group, Inc. is a diversified technology company whose operations include subsidiaries such as Genefic Specialty RX, Inc. and Genefic, Inc., indicating exposure to healthcare or specialty pharmacy financing. The group utilizes term loans and factoring arrangements to fund its activities, reflecting a reliance on structured debt facilities to support its growth and working capital needs.
